mapper.select: SELECT batch_no, product_name, template_name, raw_batch_no, planned_amount, process_date, operator, production_line, actual_temp, actual_duration, actual_pressure, actual_cool_temp, actual_fill_temp, actual_ph, actual_viscosity, batch_status FROM t_process_batch WHERE batch_no = #{batchNo} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
